name: Linear
description: Linear is a modern project management tool designed for software teams. It offers a fast, streamlined interface for issue tracking, project planning, and team workflows. Its GraphQL API provides full access to issues, projects, cycles, and comments.

capabilities.name: create_issue
capabilities.description: Create a new issue in a team's backlog with title, description, priority, assignee, and labels.

capabilities.name: list_issues
capabilities.description: Retrieve issues with filtering by team, status, assignee, label, or project.

capabilities.name: update_issue
capabilities.description: Update properties of an existing issue such as title, status, priority, or assignee.

capabilities.name: list_projects
capabilities.description: List all projects with their status, progress, lead, and associated teams.

capabilities.name: create_comment
capabilities.description: Add a comment to an existing issue for discussion and collaboration.

capabilities.name: search_issues
capabilities.description: Full-text search across all issues by keywords, returning matching results ranked by relevance.
